query: SELECT id, actorId, name, aliases, actorType, origin, LEFT(description, 100) as desc_preview, dataSource, confidence FROM threat_actors WHERE dataSource LIKE '%malpedia%' OR name REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' OR name REGEXP '^G[0-9]+$' OR name REGEXP '^TA[0-9]+$' OR description IS NULL OR description = '' ORDER BY name LIMIT 100
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2k2SuDvpDb6F44q.5f28f8362a85 --database VmWWcXQYZJYuALRdNNvsC2 --execute SELECT id, actorId, name, aliases, actorType, origin, LEFT(description, 100) as desc_preview, dataSource, confidence FROM threat_actors WHERE dataSource LIKE '%malpedia%' OR name REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' OR name REGEXP '^G[0-9]+$' OR name REGEXP '^TA[0-9]+$' OR description IS NULL OR description = '' ORDER BY name LIMIT 100
